productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Washed Blue Jeans
description: CompositionBlue stretchable denim trousers made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, has a shaded look with a torn effect, two pockets on the front, two patch pockets at the back with thread detailing, foldover leg hems with trims, looped waist, and a zipper and button closure on the frontFittingSlimWash careDelicate machine wash coldDo not bleach, scrub, wring or tumble dryHang dry in shadeWarm ironYour failsafe stretchable slim Fit day to night denim style is finally here! united colors of benetton creates this slim fit dark blue-hued jeans with a cotton-spandex fabric to offer exemplary comfort and a flattering fit, while the torn effect adds to your hip attitude. Look fabulous by pairing this with t-shirts, kurtis or blouson tops and heels.Model statisticsThe model wears jeans of length 39" Heigh: 5'7&rdquo Waist: 25&rdquo Hips: 35&rdquo
